---
title: "index"
format: html
editor: visual
---



## Nicholas Tan Qin Sheng

I am a student from Singapore Institution of Technology (SIT) studying Applied Artificial Intelligence. I am currently in my first year of study. 

I am interested in learning more about Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. I am also interested in learning more about the different types of programming languages and how they can be used to create different applications.

![Image of the *Titanic*](/docs/imgs/1469px-RMS_Titanic_3.jpg)
